LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitectBrainHemogelTooltip: Hemogel stored in this map's connected network reserves. Flesh Architect spends this reserve when growing organs.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitectBrainHemogelTooltipDev: Hemogel stored in this map's connected network reserves. Dev mode ignores building costs, but the real reserve is shown here.
LanguageData.FB_ClearColonyEyes_Desc: Remove colony eye organs in the selected cells.
LanguageData.FB_GrowColonyEye_Desc: Grow a sensory eye directly from an empty patch of colony flesh.
LanguageData.FB_GrowFleshPlant_Desc: Grow {0} from colony flesh. The plant starts newly sprouted.
LanguageData.FB_GrowGrassEyes_Desc: Grow eye grass from colony flesh. The plant starts newly sprouted.
LanguageData.FB_GrowFleshTree_Desc: Grow a flesh tree from colony flesh. The plant starts newly sprouted.
LanguageData.FB_FleshPlantTreeRoofed: Flesh trees cannot grow under roofs.
LanguageData.FB_DevFinishMaturationDesc: Immediately completes this embryo's maturation if the mature form can be placed.
